title: 3 Best Movies To Watch On HBO Max This Weekend (July 11-12)
summary: HBO Max has so many great movies that it's hard to decide what to watch. Let this weekend's film guide steer you in the right direction.

fullArticle:
Don't let the summertime blues get you down, watch these three movies on HBO Max instead. Taking its place as the third most popular streaming platform on the market today, it isn't a stretch to say that HBO Max is the go-to place for great content. Even if its subscriber base is smaller than that of Netflix or Prime Video, Max arguably maintains a higher standard of quality overall.

With brilliant and award-winning shows like The Pitt and House of the Dragon at the forefront, HBO Max has set a new benchmark for what's possible on streaming. Though the platform may always be associated with its television output, Max is also an excellent place to find great movies to watch. Films from every era are well-represented on the service, and new stuff arrives each month.
